description: Mexican criminal organization formed in 2010 to expel Los Zetas from Michoacán and Jalisco. Composed of members from various cartels including Tepalcatepec, Los Viagras, Sinaloa, La Familia Michoacana, Gulf, and Knights Templar. Known for drug trafficking in the Tierra Caliente region and ongoing conflict with CJNG. Designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. State Department in February 2025.

country_links.evidence_quote: El 31 de marzo de 2021, es arrestado en Guatemala Adalberto Fructuoso Comparán Rodríguez, "el Fruto", exalcalde de Aguililla, Michoacán y líder de Cárteles Unidos, detenido en Guatemala por una orden con fines de extradición a Estados Unidos.
country_links.context: A leader of Cárteles Unidos was arrested in Guatemala on an extradition order to the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territorio: Estado de México , Guerrero , Michoacán
country_links.context: The organization operates in the Mexican states of Estado de México, Guerrero, and Michoacán.

country_links.evidence_quote: En febrero de 2025 fue designado como una " organización terrorista " extranjera por el Departamento de Estado de Estados Unidos .
country_links.context: The organization was designated as a foreign terrorist organization by the U.S. Department of State, and its leader was extradited to the U.S. to face drug trafficking charges.
